text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: There's no way I can accept that!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Hmm... Is it that you're incredibly sensitive, or is it
that you have an exceptionally strong sense of
justice?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Oh, Trainer? No, it's nothing really.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Just a moment ago, there were some Umamusume
talking about me. They were saying—

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
They were being so cruel! They called Tachyon a
dangerous person who's always making strange
drugs!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
You're her trainer, so you won't let that slide,
right?
choice_data_list:
I'm certainly not a fan of badmouthing people
behind their back.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Right! We need to call attention to—

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Stop it! This is a waste of time.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
More importantly, I don't care. This matter is
completely unrelated to my research.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Gaining the approval of others isn't my priority.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
How can you say that?! They're all getting the
wrong idea about you. It's so sad!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Now, now, no need to get all worked up over it.
How about some tea to calm you down?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Come, follow me.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: ...Phew. Thanks for the tea.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
It made my tongue tingle a bit and had a
mysterious flavor, but it was delicious.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: I see, I see. That's good to hear.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: But... I still can't accept what happened earlier.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Saying bad things about someone who's earnestly
pursuing their dreams... it's just not right!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Hmm... You're really serious about this. What do
you think, Trainer?
choice_data_list: Let your research results prove them wrong.
Show them what makes you amazing.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
I couldn't care less if they reconsider their
opinion, but the approach in itself isn't bad.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Ah... That's true. Actually proving yourself is a
sure bet.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
You know... I'm sorry. I sort of stepped outside
my bounds there.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Hahaha! You did absolutely nothing wrong! Come
on, keep your head up.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
For some reason, seeing you feeling down makes
me restless.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: ...Hehe. Thanks for everything, Tachyon!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Well... sorry for staying so long. Thanks for the
tea!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Daiwa Scarlet seems satisfied as she leaves,
however...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
That's odd... I laced her tea with a concoction
designed to transmit signals from her nerves to
her hair, triggering movement based on her
emotions.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Her hair was supposed to stand on end in reaction
to her anger, yet...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Hmm, there was basically no change at all.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
I was hoping I'd be a step further towards
actualizing body modification, but it seems to be
another failure! Haha!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I can't help but think, perhaps she is in fact a dangerous person.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems that Agnes Tachyon learned something
from the interaction with Daiwa Scarlet.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
That's a bold thing to say... Are you suggesting I
showcase the results of my research?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
That's it! Do you have any recent successful
experiments to show off?!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Um... the one on turns, perhaps?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Turns?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Yes. I have these glasses that lead you on a less
strenuous path when navigating a turn on a track.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Wow! That sounds amazing!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
They might not be allowed in an actual race, but
you could use them during training to better
adapt to the track!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Well, perhaps, but there's still room for
improvement...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Let's do it! Why waste any time? We should show
them right now!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Right?!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: O-okay, okay. ...You really don't let up.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Pressed by Daiwa Scarlet, Agnes Tachyon works
through the night to complete the glasses.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And with their use, she successfully masters the
art of running through turns.
